config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: That’s why many readers have been writing this article! We won't tell you what we're going to explain about how that's done—we'll do so with an anecdote I will share at length here after reading some tips from those who've seen my story before (but don´t worry.) So let me know if your questions or concerns may be answered during our conversation by commenting on #1 above right now

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
